finding_results.notes: Post-argument fallout now stays on-page with embodied reactions from both characters (Anika leaves food; Ravi scraps his own meal) and an immediate behavioral consequence (he ignores a live collections call) before scene transition.
finding_results.summary: Conflict now lands in concrete aftermath instead of being defused by procedural logistics.

finding_results.notes: Added direct collections language on-page and explicit debt-driven tradeoffs: referral-fee/escalation window, postponed utility payment, and accepted Saturday overnight shift for differential coverage.
finding_results.summary: Debt pressure now appears as direct enforcement language plus specific household sacrifices.

finding_results.notes: Threaded Anika interiority through the intake/billing run so procedural exchanges are repeatedly grounded in sensation, memory, and interpretation.
finding_results.summary: Close-third focalization is sustained through intake; transcript-like blackout is removed.

finding_results.notes: Replaced explicit slogan-style debt symbol with concrete behavior/state change: she physically adjusts schedule, secures hidden plan materials, and sleeps in a body still running drills.
finding_results.summary: Ending now implies obsession through action and bodily carryover rather than literal thematic signposting.

summary: All packet findings were addressed with minimal structural churn: intake focalization was restored, collections/debt causality was made explicit, the confrontation now leaves embodied consequence on-page, and the closing lands on behavioral implication rather than overt symbolic labeling.
